TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKWebpEncoderFrame extends System.ValueType

Docs.summary: Represents a single frame in an animated WebP sequence, combining pixel data with a display duration.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKWebpEncoderFrame` pairs an image (represented as an <xref:SkiaSharp.SKPixmap>) with a <xref:System.TimeSpan> that specifies how long the frame is displayed. Use the constructors that accept <xref:SkiaSharp.SKBitmap> or <xref:SkiaSharp.SKImage> as a convenience — they internally obtain a pixmap from those objects.
Pass a span of frames to <xref:SkiaSharp.SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated*> to produce an animated WebP file.
`SKWebpEncoderFrame` is a value type and does not require disposal.
## Examples
```csharp var frames = new SKWebpEncoderFrame[] { new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap0, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)), new SKWebpEncoderFrame(bitmap1, TimeSpan.FromMilliseconds(100)), }; var options = new SKWebpEncoderOptions(SKWebpEncoderCompression.Lossy, 85); using var data = SKWebpEncoder.EncodeAnimated(frames, options); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKBitmap bitmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The bitmap that provides the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a bitmap and a duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKImage image, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The image that provides the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from an image and a duration.

MemberSignature.Value: .method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(class SkiaSharp.SKPixmap pixmap, valuetype System.TimeSpan duration) cil managed

Docs.param: The pixel map that provides the pixel data for this frame.
The length of time this frame is displayed.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a pixel map and a duration.
Gets or sets the length of time this frame is displayed in the animation.
Docs.value: The display duration for this frame.

Docs.summary: Gets or sets the pixel map containing the frame's pixel data.
